title: Business Documents Center
intro: Create professional contracts, orders, powers of attorney, protocols, declarations and dozens of other company documents in seconds — auto-filled with your company's data.
perks: Over 130 ready business templates in 24 categories
Automatic filling with your company's data
Professional editor with full freedom to edit
Download as PDF, DOCX and a print version
Saving, statuses, favorites and document history
note: Unlock the module and dozens more features to manage your whole business.

home.title: Business Documents Center
home.subtitle: {n} professional templates · {m} categories — auto-filled with your company's data
home.searchPh: Search for a document… (e.g. contract, power of attorney, order)
home.myDocsSub: All contracts and documents you've generated — in one place.
home.disclaimer: These are suggested standard templates to make your work easier. For specific legal matters we recommend consulting a professional (lawyer/accountant) before using the document.
home.recentEmpty: You have no generated documents yet.
home.favEmpty: Mark documents as favorites for quick access.
home.aiSub: Coming soon — generating documents with AI.
